name: qa-explore
description: A team of AI agents that test any web app like human QA: explore the live app, screenshot and visually judge rendering + data, capture trace/HAR/console/video evidence, adversarially verify findings, learn from rejected ones, codify them into a self-growing Playwright/Cypress suite — and close the loop by filing GitLab/GitHub issues and (via /qa-fix) opening regression-tested merge requests for confirmed bugs.
